summary: API contract fully validated: all 6 contract checks pass across GET /, GET /transactions, POST /analyze (well-formed, empty body, missing id, missing amount). The backend is running in DeepSeek LLM mode (real API key present). Three LLM-mode sanity checks confirm correct response shapes, valid risk_level values, correct fraud_score mapping, and accurate account_frozen/action_taken semantics. Direction sanity confirmed: $9000 Lagos wire returned HIGH (not LOW). All 13 HIGH-risk transactions in the DB have account_frozen=true. No contract failures, no model drift detected. DB had 11 pre-existing transactions when the run began (dirty state).
brief_for_next: Mode is DEEPSEEK (real API key active, sk-4a63... present in backend/.env). Do NOT rely on deterministic heuristic thresholds — the LLM classifies autonomously. Contract is fully healthy: all 6 checks pass, all response shapes are correct, fraud_score mapping is exact (LOW=0.0, MEDIUM=0.5, HIGH=1.0), and autonomous account freeze (action_taken=account_frozen) fires correctly for all HIGH-risk transactions. DB was dirty at run start with 11 pre-existing transactions; use distinct user IDs (e.g. reg-u10+) to avoid baseline contamination from prior simulate_attack.sh runs. $9000 Lagos wire correctly returned HIGH — model direction is sound. The API is stable and ready for fraud-simulation traffic.
